title: Unlinked task error from broken context in V3Width

features.name: class method calling this.srandom
features.description: Code should include a class with a task that calls this.srandom() where the task reference gets incorrectly linked due to wrong context during width processing

features.name: taskref cross class boundary with this method call
features.description: Code should include a task reference where the task is defined in a different class than the caller, causing context variables to point to wrong class during width analysis

features.name: std process self usage in class context
features.description: Code should include usage of process::self inside a class where the std package context is incorrectly resolved due to wrong m_pkgp value during width processing
